threshold_summary: PRIMARY INDICATOR. σ available: σ_h ≤ accuracy_target → 100; 1-2× target → 70 + FLAG: CP_SIGMA_MARGINAL; 2-5× → 30 + FLAG: CP_SIGMA_HIGH; >5× → 0 + FLAG: CP_SIGMA_REJECT. σ absent AND expected → 50 + FLAG: CP_SIGMA_NOT_EXPORTED (user can re-export). σ absent AND not expected (device limit) → N/A, weight redistributes to other category-A indicators.
data_availability_by_device_type: CB_X: ✓ / Trimble: ✓ usually / Emlid: ✓ usually / OTHER: variable (graceful degradation)

gate_action: Sets per-point completeness sub-score = 0. FLAGS: CP_FLOAT_ACCEPTED_AS_FIXED or CP_AUTONOMOUS_ACCEPTED. Severity escalates to CATASTROPHIC when effective_check_point_count < 5.
threshold_summary: FIXED → 100; FLOAT → 0 + CP_FLOAT_ACCEPTED_AS_FIXED (CRITICAL, escalates to CAT if N<5); AUTONOMOUS → 0 + CP_AUTONOMOUS_ACCEPTED.
data_availability_by_device_type: CB_X: ✓ / Trimble: ✓ (solution-status flag) / Emlid: ✓ / OTHER: usually ✓

threshold_summary: ≤2s → 100; 2-5s → 88; 5-15s → 60 + CP_STALE_CORRECTION; 15-30s → 30 + CP_STALE_CORRECTION; >30s → 0 + CP_CORRECTION_LOST. When absent (not in export) → N/A, weight redistributes.
data_availability_by_device_type: CB_X: ✓ / Trimble: ⚠ partial (often absent in JXL export) / Emlid: ⚠ partial / OTHER: typically absent

threshold_summary: downloaded AND signature valid (CB_X / Trimble where available) → 100; downloaded AND signature N/A (Emlid / OTHER) → 80; download unconfirmed → 50 + CP_LOG_DOWNLOAD_UNCONFIRMED; signature invalid → 30 + CP_LOG_TAMPERED.
data_availability_by_device_type: CB_X: ✓ signed / Trimble: ✓ partial signed / Emlid: ⚠ unsigned / OTHER: typically unsigned

gate_action: Sets per-point setup sub-score = 0. FLAG: CP_POINT_ANTENNA_HEIGHT_MISSING.
threshold_summary: antenna_height_auto_known=True (CB_X / AEROPOINT) → 100 (factory-known). device_type=DGPS / OTHER: VERTICAL AND ARP AND count≥3 AND device-report agreement → 100; single VERTICAL → 88; SLANT → 72; conflict with device-reported → 55 (review); no height entered → 0 + gate.
data_availability_by_device_type: CB_X / AEROPOINT: ✓ factory / DGPS: ✓ operator / OTHER: ✓ operator

threshold_summary: Tilt-comp-capable device (CB_X / R12+ / RS3+) with logged tilt: tilt ≤2° → 100; 2-4° → 70; >4° → 30 + CP_HIGH_TILT. Older/hand-held: tilt_compensation_used boolean is ADVISORY ONLY (operator-declarative cannot be verified) → 70 (unconfirmed); if explicitly False → 50.
data_availability_by_device_type: CB_X (tilt-comp): ✓ verifiable / Trimble R12+: ✓ verifiable / Emlid RS3+: ✓ verifiable / Older devices: declarative advisory only

threshold_summary: ≤5km → 100; 5-10km → 88; 10-20km → 70 + CP_LONG_BASELINE; 20-40km → 40 + CP_EXCESSIVE_BASELINE; >40km → 20 + CP_EXCESSIVE_BASELINE. Particularly relevant in regions with patchy CORS coverage (e.g. India).
mountpoint_match=True → 100; mountpoint_match=False → 40 + CP_UNEXPECTED_MOUNTPOINT; expected_mountpoint not declared → 70 (unconfirmed).
Match → 100; mismatch → 60 + CP_ANTENNA_TYPE_MISMATCH (MEDIUM). Sub-cm to ~3 cm vertical impact for typical short-baseline drone-survey targets.
Match → 100; mismatch → 60 + CP_DEVICE_ID_MISMATCH (MEDIUM provenance, reviewer-blocking); either side missing → 70 (unconfirmed).
≤2 → 100; 2-4 → 80; 4-6 → 55; >6 → 30 + CP_HIGH_PDOP. Distinct from multipath — captures sky geometry at the capture moment.
≥5s held FIXED → 100; 1-4s → 60 + CP_SHORT_FIX_HOLD; <1s → 30 + CP_NO_FIX_HOLD. When absent → N/A, weight redistributes.
data_availability_by_device_type: CB_X: ✓ / Trimble: ⚠ partial / Emlid: ⚠ partial / OTHER: typically N/A

threshold_summary: sats ≥10 AND CN0 ≥40 dBHz → 100; sats 7-9 OR CN0 30-40 → 70; sats <7 OR CN0 <30 → 35 + CP_HIGH_MULTIPATH. Less able to detect multipath than PPK (no extended observation to compute variance).

Kp ≤4 OR dual_freq → 100; Kp 5-6 single-freq → 60; Kp ≥7 single-freq → 40 + CP_IONO_RISK. KNOWN LIMITATION: Kp under-detects equatorial scintillation (relevant for India); long-term roadmap to S4/ROTI source.
data_availability_by_device_type: External NOAA SWPC dependency; same for all device types
